series_highest_x_label: For series "{series_label}", what x-axis label corresponds to its {extremum_phrase} y-axis value? {unanswerable_instruction}
Find the point where series "{series_label}" has its {extremum_phrase} y-axis value. What is the x-axis label? {unanswerable_instruction}
In series "{series_label}", which x-axis label has the {extremum_phrase} y-axis value? {unanswerable_instruction}
Use the legend to locate series "{series_label}". What x-axis label is at its {extremum_phrase} value? {unanswerable_instruction}
What x-axis label marks the {extremum_phrase} point for series "{series_label}"? {unanswerable_instruction}
series_lowest_x_label: For series "{series_label}", what x-axis label corresponds to its {extremum_phrase} y-axis value? {unanswerable_instruction}
Find the point where series "{series_label}" has its {extremum_phrase} y-axis value. What is the x-axis label? {unanswerable_instruction}
In series "{series_label}", which x-axis label has the {extremum_phrase} y-axis value? {unanswerable_instruction}
Use the legend to locate series "{series_label}". What x-axis label is at its {extremum_phrase} value? {unanswerable_instruction}
What x-axis label marks the {extremum_phrase} point for series "{series_label}"? {unanswerable_instruction}
series_pair_value_gap_at_x: At x-axis label "{target_x_label}", what is the absolute difference between series "{series_label}" and series "{comparison_series_label}"?
Use the legend to compare series "{series_label}" and "{comparison_series_label}" at "{target_x_label}". What is the absolute difference between their y-axis values?
For x-axis label "{target_x_label}", subtract the smaller y-axis value from the larger one for series "{series_label}" and "{comparison_series_label}". What is the result?
At "{target_x_label}", what gap separates the y-axis values of series "{series_label}" and "{comparison_series_label}"?
Read both series "{series_label}" and "{comparison_series_label}" at x-axis label "{target_x_label}". What is their absolute y-value gap?
series_value_at_x_value: For series "{series_label}" at x-axis label "{target_x_label}", what y-axis value is shown?
Use the legend to locate series "{series_label}". What value does it show at "{target_x_label}"?
At x-axis label "{target_x_label}", read the y-axis value for series "{series_label}". What is it?
What printed y-axis value belongs to series "{series_label}" at "{target_x_label}"?
Find series "{series_label}" at x-axis label "{target_x_label}". What is the displayed value?
series_y_anchor_other_series_value: In series "{series_label}", find the point with y-axis value {target_y_value}. At that same x-axis label, what y-axis value does series "{comparison_series_label}" have?
Use series "{series_label}" to locate y-axis value {target_y_value}, then use the same x-axis label in series "{comparison_series_label}". What y-axis value is shown there?
Find the x-axis label where series "{series_label}" has y-axis value {target_y_value}. What is the y-axis value of series "{comparison_series_label}" at that x-axis label?
Series "{series_label}" includes a point labeled {target_y_value}. At the same x-axis position, what value is printed for series "{comparison_series_label}"?
Anchor on y-axis value {target_y_value} in series "{series_label}". What value does series "{comparison_series_label}" have at that matching x-axis label?
x_highest_series_label: At x-axis label "{target_x_label}", which series has the {extremum_phrase} y-axis value?
Use the legend and the points at "{target_x_label}". Which series is {extremum_phrase} there?
For x-axis label "{target_x_label}", what series label corresponds to the {extremum_phrase} value?
Compare all series at "{target_x_label}". Which visible series has the {extremum_phrase} y-axis value?
Which series reaches the {extremum_phrase} value at x-axis label "{target_x_label}"?
x_lowest_series_label: At x-axis label "{target_x_label}", which series has the {extremum_phrase} y-axis value?
Use the legend and the points at "{target_x_label}". Which series is {extremum_phrase} there?
For x-axis label "{target_x_label}", what series label corresponds to the {extremum_phrase} value?
Compare all series at "{target_x_label}". Which visible series has the {extremum_phrase} y-axis value?
Which series reaches the {extremum_phrase} value at x-axis label "{target_x_label}"?

answer_and_annotation:
Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Answer format: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Answer field: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Required annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Required answer format: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Final annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Final answer format: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Format for the "annotation" field: {annotation_hint}.
Format for the "answer" field: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

query:series_highest_x_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested x-axis label as a string
query:series_highest_x_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x,y] pixel point at the center of the selected scatter mark; if the answer is "unanswerable", use an empty object

query:series_lowest_x_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested x-axis label as a string
query:series_lowest_x_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x,y] pixel point at the center of the selected scatter mark; if the answer is "unanswerable", use an empty object

query:series_pair_value_gap_at_x.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested absolute difference as an integer
query:series_pair_value_gap_at_x.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one segment [[x0,y0],[x1,y1]] connecting the centers of the two compared scatter marks

query:series_value_at_x_value.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested y-axis value as an integer
query:series_value_at_x_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x,y] pixel point at the center of the selected scatter mark

query:series_y_anchor_other_series_value.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested y-axis value as an integer
query:series_y_anchor_other_series_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x,y] pixel point at the center of the comparison-series scatter mark that gives the answer

query:x_highest_series_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible series label as a string
query:x_highest_series_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x,y] pixel point at the center of the answer series scatter mark

query:x_lowest_series_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible series label as a string
query:x_lowest_series_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x,y] pixel point at the center of the answer series scatter mark
